summary: Iteration 251 - H² (Hexagram Squared) Engine Testing Complete. Backend: 15/15 tests passed (100%). All H² endpoints working: POST /api/quad-hex/resolve-h2 returns full 24×24 matrix with 576 intersections, cross_cluster_resonance, matrix_density, determinant_proxy, variable_return_tax, cross_cluster_effects. POST /api/broker/trade includes h2_analysis with pass1/pass2/determinant/density. Frontend: HexagramGrid panel in Orbital Mixer Playground shows phase, alignment, density, determinant, cluster scores with line indicators, cross-cluster resonance bars, interference effects. SmartDock shows dust|gems micro-wallet badge.
critical_code_review_comments: quad_hexagram.py: compute_h2_matrix() generates 24×24 matrix with phase-weighted interference values
quad_hexagram.py: compute_cross_cluster_resonance() calculates 4×4 resonance map between clusters
quad_hexagram.py: compute_matrix_determinant_proxy() returns positive (additive) or negative (extractive) value
quad_hexagram.py: compute_variable_return_tax() adjusts tax 15-45% based on matrix density
quad_hexagram.py: apply_cross_cluster_effects() derives transmutation_modifier, tax_modifier, sentinel_escalation
ai_broker.py: _run_quad_scan() implements recursive 2-pass verification (Pass 1: fundamental rules, Pass 2: determinant check)
ai_broker.py: Trade response includes h2_analysis with pass1, pass2, determinant, matrix_density, economy_health
HexagramGrid.js: Shows phase, alignment, density, determinant with Additive/Extractive indicator
HexagramGrid.js: Displays 4 cluster scores (Security, Location, Finance, Evolution) with line indicators
HexagramGrid.js: Cross-Cluster Resonance section shows all cluster pair resonance percentages
HexagramGrid.js: Interference Effects shows transmute modifier, tax modifier, variable tax, economy health
HexagramGrid.js: 576-Cell Grid toggle expands to show full 24×24 interference visualization
SmartDock.js: wallet-micro-badge shows dust|gems when not expanded and user has balance
OrbitalMixer.js: H² button (orbital-hexgrid-btn) opens HexagramGrid panel
OrbitalMixer.js: Community button (orbital-community-btn) with notification dot for new posts
test_credentials: email: grad_test_522@test.com, password: password (has ~250 dust, 2 gems)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 251 verified H² Engine: (1) POST /api/quad-hex/resolve-h2 returns full 24×24 matrix (576 cells), cross_cluster_resonance map, matrix_density, determinant_proxy, variable_return_tax (15-45%), cross_cluster_effects. (2) POST /api/quad-hex/resolve still returns linear 24-bit state vector (backward compat). (3) GET /api/quad-hex/tensor returns cached H² tensor. (4) GET /api/quad-hex/phase returns current phase (harmonic/fractal/elemental). (5) POST /api/broker/trade uses recursive 2-pass verification with H² matrix, returns h2_analysis. (6) GET /api/broker/scan-preview includes h2_analysis. (7) Bank endpoints (wallet, earn, policy) working. (8) Sentinel scan is phase-aware. (9) Frontend HexagramGrid accessible via H² button in Orbital Mixer Playground at /cosmic-mixer. (10) SmartDock shows dust|gems wallet badge. (11) Community button visible in Orbital Mixer.
